title: Simplywands
description: A mod that adds a bunch of useful wands.
body:
# Welcome to Simplywands!
**Simplify and streamline your Minecraft experience with Simplywands, a Quality of Life mod that introduces a range of wands designed to make everyday tasks easier and more efficient. Whether you're managing resources, exploring, or building, these wands will enhance your gameplay by saving time and effort.**

‎
## Wand Collection

### Sponge Wand 
Quickly clear water from your surroundings, making underwater building and resource gathering hassle-free.


### Lava Sponge Wand 
Eliminate dangerous lava with ease, making mining and construction safer and more efficient.


### Growth Wand 
Instantly grow your crops, reducing the waiting time and boosting your farming productivity.


### Magnetic Wand 
Effortlessly gather nearby items without having to move around. Perfect for busy inventory management and cleanup.


### Teleportation Wand 
Move around your world more quickly, whether for exploration or escaping tricky situations.


### Illumination Wand 
Instantly place light sources wherever needed, brightening dark areas and making nighttime tasks more manageable.


### Acceleration Wand 
Speed up processes in vanilla machines, making your automated setups more efficient.


### Love Wand 
Harness the power of love to breed any willing creature, making animal husbandry a breeze.


### Ore-Locator Wand 
Locate ores with ease, enhancing your mining efficiency and resource gathering.
Now works on servers, writing the coordinates for the nearest cluster of the same ore.


### Vein-Miner Wand 
Mines entire veins of ores.
Quickly and efficiently mine entire veins of ores in one go, streamlining your resource collection process.


### Food Wand 
Automatically eats food from the player's inventory when hungry.
(only if activated).


### Resurrection Wand 
Break in case of death. Saves you if you are in a pickle

## SimplyWands Tab
**_All these wands are neatly organized under the "Simplywands" tab in your creative inventory, providing quick access to these QoL tools._**



### More to Come

**This is just the beginning! Stay tuned for more wands and features in future updates.**
